installConfigs.instructions: Remote Netlify MCP server. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Netlify account via OAuth. Provides tools to create and manage Netlify projects, deploys, and environment variables. Alternatively, Netlify offers a local server via 'npx -y @netlify/mcp'.

Remote Netlify MCP server. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Netlify account via OAuth. Provides tools to create and manage Netlify projects, deploys, and environment variables. Alternatively, Netlify offers a local server via 'npx -y @netlify/mcp'.
